title: Generalized worry documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports anxiety and worry history, duration, distress, functional impairment, comorbid depression or anxiety, substance use, medical and treatment history, education, and active monitoring.
assessment.rationale: Supports worry, duration, distress, function, comorbidity and monitoring for generalized worry; no decision is generated.

source.title: Generalised anxiety disorder and panic disorder in adults: management — Recommendations
source.population: Adults with known or suspected generalised anxiety disorder or panic disorder.
source.setting: Primary, community, and specialist mental-health care.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult GAD identification, assessment, stepped care, risk, and clinician-led management; not exact for children, every anxiety subtype, or UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.2–1.2.11 — identification, assessment, education, and monitoring

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports anxiety and worry history, duration, distress, functional impairment, comorbid depression or anxiety, substance use, medical and treatment history, education, and active monitoring.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-documented discussion of psychological or medication options, patient preference, treatment information, monitoring, and referral or relapse planning without autonomous treatment output.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-led treatment and shared-decision context for generalized worry; no decision is generated.

assessment.text: Supports documenting severe functional impairment, self-harm or suicide risk, substance misuse, self-neglect, treatment history, home and community support, family impact, referral, and collaborative care planning.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-completed high-risk assessment for generalized worry; no decision is generated.
